awesomeList.descriptionHTML: A curated list of amazingly awesome things regarding Preact ecosystem 🌟
awesomeList.description: A curated list of amazingly awesome things regarding Preact ecosystem :star2:

nodes.itemHTML: • Preact Transitioningstars15 - Exposes Preact components for easily implementing basic CSS animations and transitions.
• Slack (Discussion Forum)
• Cinemate - Movie Recommender System built with Preact and TypeScript. Backend written in Rust.
• Unistorestars2.8k - 350b / 650b state container with component actions for Preact & React.
• Preact Chrome Extensionstars16 - A Full Feature Preact Chrome Extension Starter Kit
• macOS Web - macOS Big Sur Desktop experience for Web, built with Preact and Vite (Github projectstars739)
• Vitestars25.7k - Fast native-ESM powered web dev build tool for Preact, Vue or React.
• Pantstars13 - Mobile UI Components built on Preact (docs and demos). Ported from awesome Vue components of Vantstars17.3k.
• Preact Dockstars17 - Simple DnD and touch-enabled Dock for Preact apps.
• Preact Particlesstars1.8k - Lightweight component to easily add cool particles animations to websites.
• Passwords Fountain - modern & performant password manager interface which works everywhere (Github projectstars60).
• hooked-headstars273 - Hooks to manipulate the <head> section of the DOM. This has a subpackage with core preact support (using preact/hooks).
• GHFresh Monitor GitHub repository releases – Prerendering with Preact. Built with Preact Compat, TypeScript, Material-UI and Redux Toolkit. (GitHub Projectstars3).
• Preact App in ES6 without Babel or JSX (GitHub Projectstars4).
• MU Formsstars52 - Dead simple form library for (P)React.
• Preact-urql - Use urqlstars5.9k with Preact core + hooks.

• Songsterr 🎼 Using Preact X in production since 10.0 alpha

• ESBench is built using Preact.

• Preact Gallery an 8KB photo gallery PWA built using Preact.
• Rainbow Explorer Preact app to translate real life color to digital color (Github projectstars26).
• YASCC Yet Another SoundCloud Client (Github projectstars30).
• Journalize 14k offline-capable journaling PWA using preact. (Github projectstars31).
• Proxx A game of proximity by GoogleChromeLabs using preact. (Github projectstars1.1k).

• Preact Translatestars55 - Minimalistic translate (i18n) library for Preact.
• Wouterstars3.1k - A tiny (1KB gzip) router for Preact/React with React Router-like API.
• ClearXstars11 - Fast & Effortless state management for React, Preact and Inferno with zero learning curve.
• Storybook Preact - Storybook for Preact is a UI development environment for your Preact components.
• Code and Commentstars16 - The application to add the comments to a file in Github (demo).
• Preact Route Asyncstars33 - A (440b gzip) route component that enables async loading of page-components.
• Preact Component Consolestars29 - Console Emulator. Simulates typing via dynamic delays.
• ProppyJS - A tiny library for functional props composition
• Pimgstars98 - Progressive Image Component; Used for lazy loading images.
